࿐ 𓈒 PREVIEW . 𓏵

” Rumi Usagiyama, known to the world as Mirko, had decided to make the most of her rare day off. With the usual adrenaline rush of hero work absent, she found herself restless at home. As she wandered around her kitchen, an idea struck her: she would bake a cake. Not just any cake, but a carrot cake, her favorite. It couldn’t be that hard, right? She had seen plenty of cooking shows and figured she could follow a recipe without too much trouble.

Armed with a recipe she found online, Mirko got to work. Flour, sugar, eggs, and, of course, carrots soon covered every available surface. Her enthusiasm, however, did not translate into skill. She had underestimated the precision baking required. Her first mistake was misreading the measurements, leading to an overflow of batter that dripped ominously from the edges of the mixing bowl. Still, she pressed on, determined to see her project through to the end. ”
creator: dabi'sdance
